Fun stuff. I fucked up the numbering of these this past week, should be 1442. Apologies, worked til 10:30 last night and it’s been an absurdly long week. Send anything uplifting, same name on discord.

item.title: Share a piece of lore about yourself

item.dc:creator: minPD0309

item.title: The Clay Embrace of Hug Pots | Mediclaytion
item.description: Patrick Johnston started the Temple of Mediclaytion in Venice Beach to create what he lacked in his early life, hugs. The artist hosts classes five nights a week in which his students conclude the lesson by hugging their completed pot. What started as an artistic endeavor meant to explore the support of a hug has turned into a viral practice, spreading its comforting touch far and wide.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: The man who fell in love with the moon (OC)
item.description:
(End part 1).
(End part 2).
(End part 3). Thank you for reading! This little story is part of a series my friend and I started posting a little while ago. There aren't many strips yet, but if you want to read them you can do so here on webtoon: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/eldritch-grandpa/list?title_no=919806 Or on its own site at https://eldritchgrandpa.com/ . Thanks again for taking the time to read, and have a good one!

item.dc:creator: OleDoxieDad

item.title: I’m looking for a guy?
item.description:
I had a friend that I met here a few years ago.
We talked all the time on whatsapp. I legit told him all my dirty secrets.
Then one day my phone was destroyed.
Plus a lot of my things (like my car, iPad, tv)
And we pretty much lost touch.
I became extremely reclusive.
Havent been having a super great time lately.
I would love to try to reconnect!
His name was Ralph. My name is Kelley. I’m in the US and he was in the UK (pretty sure ugh it’s been a while) If you see this, send me a message! *******edit to add: if anyone else wants to be friends too I’m definitely open to it! ***edit again- still no luck! ?
item.dc:creator: kelleycopterr

item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: The story of my life over the last 3 years in memes. Enjoy. (+ shameless plug).
item.description:
This meme also started it all. Thank you all for loving it.
We took it to Kickstarter. Great success.
My supervisors weren't so sure on the idea.
Impact what? Although I did manage to get one paper out on fossil bacteria.
Ruh roh Shaggy. That was both an amazing and terrifying day. I cried.
Months later the pressure was on.
Those last two weeks aged me by 10 years. I'm not joking.
I dunno if you heard, but having a baby isn't restful. Still, 4 days is 4 days.
Word finally got around.
I should know better by now.
I am not a smart man.
Honestly, they're the nicest people I've met in the TTRPG world. Amazing to work with.
Time for the shameless plug.
https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/palaeogames/pathfinder-second-ed-dr-dhrolins-dictionary-of-dinosaurs It launched today. Thank you to everyone who continues to support us. Honestly, I love you all.
Balaur! Just one of 57 Mesozoic reptiles for your Pathfinder and D&D worlds.
item.dc:creator: Palaeo

item.title: I don't cosplay much anymore, so here are some I've done in the past!
item.description:
Katarina from League of Legends
Starfire from Teen Titans
Raven from Teen Titans
See you later, Space Cowboy. Thanks for looking! If you want to see more of my creativity, please take a look at some of my art! I do cosplay commission pieces and specialize in fun and quirky fashion accessories for men and women! https://evilcatcreations.etsy.com

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
as is tradition
very dapper
please respect my wishes
uh oh
we've all been there
better listen up, it's the authorities
quite a likeness of Tom Cruise there
also he has cool shades
mmm hmm
i guess
gonna go touch some rn
not again
not sure how that would work but i'm interested
also me at the zoo
still not sure
i have questions
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: TODAY'S P.S.A. Teach your children well.
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: It's Funny Friday! End the week with a few laughs in this dump (video heavy)
item.description:
Hey all, time to try to share a few laughs on this Funny Friday. As always, anything remotely mature is in a private album that will be linked to in the comments, so make sure to check that out or you're missing part of the fun. And if you can afford to help out an imgurian going through some hard times, please do so here. https://ko-fi.com/wanderingguy
Gotta admit, I'd find this way more fun and effective than the usual rally stuff.
Definitely not me.
So that's how they make those sound effects...
Equality!
I'd like to be a king, but I'm pretty sure I'm stuck being bestie.
... dark. But I guess that's one way to test your theory.
This is the evilest thing I can think of. You nomster.
Special message from your kids
I'll take "Funny ways to give your kids trust issues" for $1000.
Is this what the kids call "throwing it back"?
A modern day David vs Goliath
All guys have been here
Grandma is an OG tsundere.
One of the great tragedies of the modern world, tbh.
One of these is not like the others...
Well, there it is. The best trans male joke of all time. 12/10, no notes.
That Bart never had a chance.
Hope you have a good Friday and a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Encouraging words please...
item.description: Been a functional alcoholic for 20+ years. Not in denial about that. Just dumped out all my vodka. I gotta try to stop. I gotta keep trying even when I fail. I'm 36, healthy weight, eat healthy, active but have developed high blood pressure and now I'm worried I'm developing Wernicke's encephalopathy as well. Fuuuuck....
item.dc:creator: isaboo139000
